title: Mirage Unified Virtual Filesystem For Solar
evidence: Mirage exposes a unified virtual filesystem for AI agents and supports Disk, Google Workspace, GitHub, Postgres, Redis, SSH, Notion, and other resources.
Solar currently has separate access paths for Solar DB, Cortex, Obsidian/QMD, sprint files, and local project files.
Google Drive must be optional and read-only by default because credentials may not be present and remote writes are high risk.

history.note: Created PRD for Mirage unified virtual filesystem integration.
Created P1 data-plane contract; Mirage must unify Solar DB, Cortex, Knowledge/QMD, local files, and optional Google Drive behind solar-harness mirage.
Queued behind active P0 sprint-20260508-solar-kb-obsidian-autouse to avoid interrupting current KB/Obsidian mainline.
User requested Solar to work on Mirage; status moved to drafting/spec with handoff_to=planner while retaining P1 priority and blocked_by marker.
Planner produced design.md; local probe found Mirage CLI/Python/npm package not installed, so install/doctor/degraded local-only mode is the first implementation step.
Planner pane compact stalled before plan.md; Codex completed plan from PRD/contract/design and moved sprint to active/planning_complete for builder dispatch.
Created S1/S2 scoped dispatch files for lab builders because coordinator did not auto-dispatch immediately.

Design and plan written. Status moved to active/planning_complete; builder_main is next. Sprint remains queued behind P0 sprint-20260508-solar-kb-obsidian-autouse via blocked_by; coordinator must wait for P0 PASS before dispatching builders. Three slices defined: S1 install/doctor/manifest/CLI, S2 unified search bridge, S3 status/events/security/tests/docs. Disjoint write ownership and no-live-pane-mutation tests enforced.

history.reason: P0 SECURITY: deny_subpaths + redact_on_read 在 exec 层未接通，见 fix-dispatch-test.md (F-D2-A/B P0 + F-D3 P1 + F-D4 P2)。详细测试报告 reports/mirage-cortex-access-test-20260508.{md,json}。修复后必须重跑 T7c+T10。
Round 3 PASS: P0 安全修复 (deny_subpaths + redact_on_read 在 exec 层接通) 经实测验证, A1-A8 全过, 33/33 测试通过, 7 项否证全失败
